Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class CustomObject

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.CustomObject
public class CustomObject extends Metadata

Java class for CustomObject complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="CustomObject">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="actionOverrides" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ActionOverride" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="allowInChatterGroups" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="articleTypeChannelDisplay" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ArticleTypeChannelDisplay" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="businessProcesses" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}BusinessProcess" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="compactLayoutAssignment" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="compactLayouts" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}CompactLayout" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="customHelp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="customHelpPage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="customSettingsType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}CustomSettingsType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="deploymentStatus" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DeploymentStatus" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="deprecated" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableActivities" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableBulkApi" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableDataTranslation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableDivisions" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEnhancedLookup" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableFeeds" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableHistory" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableLicensing" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enablePublishStatusTracking" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableReports" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSearch" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSharing" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableStreamingApi" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="eventType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}PlatformEventType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="externalDataSource" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="externalName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="externalRepository" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="externalSharingModel" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}SharingModel" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="fieldSets" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FieldSet" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="fields" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}CustomField" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="gender" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Gender" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="historyRetentionPolicy" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}HistoryRetentionPolicy" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="household" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="indexes" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Index" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="listViews" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ListView" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="mktDataLakeAttributes" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}MktDataLakeAttributes" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="mktDataModelAttributes" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}MktDataModelAttributes" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="nameField" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}CustomField" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="pluralLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="profileSearchLayouts" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ProfileSearchLayouts" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="publishBehavior" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}PlatformEventPublishBehavior" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="recordTypeTrackFeedHistory" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="recordTypeTrackHistory" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="recordTypes" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}RecordType" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="searchLayouts" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}SearchLayouts" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sharingModel" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}SharingModel" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sharingReasons" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}SharingReason" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sharingRecalculations" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}SharingRecalculation" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="startsWith" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}StartsWith" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="validationRules" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ValidationRule" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="visibility" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}SetupObjectVisibility" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="webLinks" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}WebLink" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

  • Constructor Details

    • CustomObject

      public CustomObject()

  • Method Details

    • getActionOverrides

      public List<ActionOverride> getActionOverrides()
      Gets the value of the actionOverrides property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the actionOverrides property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getActionOverrides().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ActionOverride

      Returns:
      The value of the actionOverrides property.

    • isAllowInChatterGroups

      public Boolean isAllowInChatterGroups()
      Gets the value of the allowInChatterGroups property.
      Returns:
      possible object is Boolean

    • setAllowInChatterGroups

      public void setAllowInChatterGroups(Boolean value)
      Sets the value of the allowInChatterGroups property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is Boolean

    • getArticleTypeChannelDisplay

      public ArticleTypeChannelDisplay getArticleTypeChannelDisplay()
      Gets the value of the articleTypeChannelDisplay property.
      Returns:
      possible object is ArticleTypeChannelDisplay

    • setArticleTypeChannelDisplay

      public void setArticleTypeChannelDisplay(ArticleTypeChannelDisplay value)
      Sets the value of the articleTypeChannelDisplay property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is ArticleTypeChannelDisplay

    • getBusinessProcesses

      public List<BusinessProcess> getBusinessProcesses()
      Gets the value of the businessProcesses property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the businessProcesses property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getBusinessProcesses().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list BusinessProcess

      Returns:
      The value of the businessProcesses property.

    • getCompactLayoutAssignment

      public String getCompactLayoutAssignment()
      Gets the value of the compactLayoutAssignment property.
      Returns:
      possible object is String

    • setCompactLayoutAssignment

      public void setCompactLayoutAssignment(String value)
      Sets the value of the compactLayoutAssignment property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is String

    • getCompactLayouts

      public List<CompactLayout> getCompactLayouts()
      Gets the value of the compactLayouts property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the compactLayouts property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getCompactLayouts().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list CompactLayout

      Returns:
      The value of the compactLayouts property.

    • getCustomHelp

      public String getCustomHelp()
      Gets the value of the customHelp property.
      Returns:
      possible object is String

      Parameters:

    • getCustomSettingsType

    • getFieldSets

      public List<FieldSet> getFieldSets()
      Gets the value of the fieldSets property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the fieldSets property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getFieldSets().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list FieldSet

      Returns:
      The value of the fieldSets property.

    • getFields

      public List<CustomField> getFields()
      Gets the value of the fields property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the fields property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getFields().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list CustomField

      Returns:
      The value of the fields property.
